parameters.text: ={{ (() => { try { const raw = $json.choices && $json.choices[0] ? $json.choices[0].message.content : null; if (!raw) return '시황 코멘트를 생성하지 못했습니다.'; const r = JSON.parse(raw); return r.title + '\n\n' + r.summary; } catch(e) { return $json.choices[0].message.content; } })() }}

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
